rationale: The proposed change to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount has no relation to Educ. Code §38.252, which governs regional education service centers' mental health resource inventories. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 38.252. REGIONAL INVENTORY OF MENTAL HEALTH RESOURCES.
_note: Rule text concerns student mental health resource inventories; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict.
